name: Eslead Corporation
summary: Eslead Corporation develops and sells family-type and urban condominiums in Japan. The company also rebuilds and sells condominiums. In addition, it is involved in building and condominium management, real estate brokerage, detached house sales, power supply, hotel, and condominium and building cleaning businesses. The company was formerly known as Nihon Eslead Corporation and changed its name to Eslead Corporation in October 2019. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan. Eslead Corporation is a subsidiary of Mori Trust Co., Ltd.
